zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance de Mauley於1371年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾惠特比時，她的父親Piers de Maulay21歲，母親Margery de Sutton22歲。她於1407年之前與Sir John Bigod在英國英格蘭越可爾澤特林頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年12月15日在英國英格蘭越可爾澤特林頓享年79歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾澤特林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance de Mauley于1371年出生在英国英格兰越可爾惠特比时，她的父亲Piers de Maulay21岁，母亲Margery de Sutton22岁。她于1407年之前与Sir John Bigod在英国英格兰越可爾澤特林頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年12月15日在英国英格兰越可爾澤特林頓享年79岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾澤特林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mauley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Rusyn (from Slovakia) and Slovak Mašlej or Maslej, Polish Maślej, and probably also of Ukrainian Masliy: derivative of maslo (Polish masło) ‘butter’, applied as an occupational name for a dairyman or perhaps as a nickname (see Maslak ).

English: possibly a variant of Mansley with loss of -n-, itself perhaps a variant of Munslow, a habitational name from Munslow in Shropshire. The placename derives from an uncertain initial element + Old English hlāw ‘mound, hill’.

variants.name: Maslak
meanings: Polish and Jewish (from Poland) (Maślak): nickname from Polish maślak, the name of a species of edible fungus.

Slovak and Czech (Maslák); Polish and Jewish (from Poland) (Maślak); Ukrainian and Croatian; Rusyn (in Poland spelled Maślak): derivative of Slavic maslo (Polish masło) ‘butter’, applied as an occupational name for maker or seller of dairy produce, or perhaps as nickname for someone who was ‘as soft as butter’.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

en.lifeSummary: When Constance de Mauley was born in 1371, in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Piers de Maulay, was 21 and her mother, Margery de Sutton, was 22. She married Sir John Bigod before 1407, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 15 December 1450, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79, and was buried in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance de Mauley est née en 1371, à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Piers de Maulay, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery de Sutton, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Bigod avant 1407, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 décembre 1450, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Constance de Mauley 1371 in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers de Maulay 21 und ihre Mutter Margery de Sutton 22. Sie hat vor 1407 in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Bigod geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Dezember 1450 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Settrington, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Mauley è nata il nel 1371 nel Whitby, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Piers de Maulay, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margery de Sutton, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Bigod prima del 1407, nel Settrington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 dicembre 1450, nel Settrington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Settrington, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance de Mauleyが1371年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーで生まれた時，父Piers de Maulayは21歳，母Margery de Suttonは22歳であった。1407年以前にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンでSir John Bigodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年12月15日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンで79歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Constance de Mauley(이)가 1371년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 휘트비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers de Maulay(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Sutton(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1407년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 Sir John Bigod(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 12월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 세트링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance de Mauley nasceu em 1371, em Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Piers de Maulay, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Sutton, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Bigod antes 1407, em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1450, em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance de Mauley родилась в 1371 г. в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Piers de Maulay было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery de Sutton, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Bigod перед 1407 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 декабря 1450 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Constance de Mauley nació en 1371, en Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Piers de Maulay, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margery de Sutton, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir John Bigod antes de 1407, en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1450, en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
